# `aube runtime`

- **Usage**: `aube runtime <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Aliases**: `rt`

Manage the project's Node.js runtime (pin, install, inspect)

## Subcommands

- [`aube runtime list`](/cli/runtime/list.md)
- [`aube runtime set [FLAGS] <NAME> <VERSION>`](/cli/runtime/set.md)
